CustomField.formula: IF( LEFT(B2C_Plateau__c, 3) == 'PAP', 'PAP DGP', IF( LEFT(B2C_Plateau__c, 6) == 'CORNER', 'CORNER', IF( OR(B2C_Plateau__c == 'TVE_COMDATA_POITIERS_RDV', B2C_Plateau__c == 'TVE_EUROCRM_WEB'), 'Rebond Form ENGIE', IF( B2C_Plateau__c == 'PAP_SIM', 'Pop-up Store', IF( B2C_Plateau__c == 'SWAPP_NP', 'CORNERS', IF( RIGHT(B2C_Plateau__c,3) == 'LEE', 'LEE DGP', IF( LEFT(B2C_Plateau__c, 3) == 'DPP', 'CRC DGP', IF( LEFT(B2C_Plateau__c, 5) == 'DCRCP', 'CRC DGP', IF( LEFT(B2C_Plateau__c, 3) == 'TVE', 'TELEVENTE DGP', IF( LEFT(B2C_Plateau__c, 3) == 'EHS', 'CRC EHS', IF( LEFT(B2C_Plateau__c, 3) == 'PIL', 'WEB formulaire DGP','')))))))))))
CustomField.label: Code origine
